title: Ralsei healing totem
description: This Modpack adds ralsei to a totem
body:
Add ralsei to totem


(it should work on all verisons)
(it works like a normal totem)

(the assests are own by toby fox)
(to add to your verison go to) 
the three dots on your verion - go to resourcepacks - and put it in there


(Here the tut on how I made it)
